name: code-review
description: Validates a pull request against the full SDD artifact chain (PRD, RFC, Contract) and project rules (CLAUDE.md). Runs a 6-step pipeline: Discovery Inverso, PRD Traceability, Contract Compliance, Project Rules Compliance, Cross-validation, and Scope Check. Produces a structured review report with BLOCKER/WARNING/INFO findings and a final verdict (APPROVE, REQUEST_CHANGES, APPROVE_WITH_COMMENTS). Triggers: 'code review', 'review PR', 'revisar PR', 'validar PR', 'review against CLAUDE.md', 'SDD review', 'review pipeline'.
author: Juan Estrada
capabilities: Validates PR files against RFC phases (discovery inverso)
Maps PRD acceptance criteria to tests (traceability)
Checks endpoint/DTO compliance against API contracts
Enforces project architecture rules from CLAUDE.md
Detects contradictions across PRD, RFC, Contract and code
Produces structured review report with severity ratings
Posts review as GitHub PR comment
